name: Fairfax County Public Schools
about: Fairfax County Public Schools is the largest school district in Virginia and one of the largest in the United States, serving approximately 181,000 students in Fairfax County.
calendarNotes: Fairfax County Public Schools starts the school year in late August. Spring Break falls in late March, a major travel period for the D.C. metro population. Families coordinating with D.C. Public Schools or Maryland districts should check each calendar separately, as Spring Break timing can differ by one to two weeks. FCPS is also one of the most diverse school systems in the country, and families from international backgrounds should note that many religious and cultural observances are recognized, with some schools offering adjusted schedules.
